docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT HAMILTON, TERRY TERENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00) SERVED MAY-24-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HAMILTON, TERRY TERENCE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING AND QUALITY ASSURANCE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING AND QUALITY ASSURANCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMILTON, TERRY TERENCE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,635.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
